data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced an increase on the stock market while President Trump addressed Iran. This news of stock market movement was covered live and detailed in Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Bessent Defends Trump's Iran War Move Saying US Economy Was In 'Good Shape'— But Warns Growth May Be Slower This Quarter
data.description: In a recent interview, Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent expressed concerns regarding the impact of the U.S.-Iran conflict on economic growth for the current quarter. Bessent indicated that the growth might be slower than previously expected due to the ongoing war. He highlighted the strong state of the economy prior to the conflict, attributing President Donald Trump's decision to go to war to positive economic indicators. Bessent's assessment was based on analyzing "micro data points" from various companies and banks rather than making precise GDP forecasts. He referenced JP Morgan Chase (NYSE: JPM) CEO Jamie Dimon's remarks on consumer credit and highlighted corporate earnings as evidence that consumers and businesses are still resilient. When questioned about predicting GDP, Bessent emphasized that it would depend on the duration of the conflict, which remains uncertain. He mentioned that the prediction would be influenced by how long the conflict lasts, whether it's "three days or three weeks."

data.title: Ranger Energy Services, Inc. Announces Date for First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
data.description: Houston-based Ranger Energy Services, Inc. (NYSE:RNGR) is set to disclose its first quarter financial and operational performance on Monday, April 27, 2026, post-market close. The Company will conduct an earnings conference call on Tuesday, April 28, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. ET (9:00 a.m. CT). For those wishing to participate, dial 1-833-255-2829 (U.S.) or 1-412-902-6710 (international).

data.title: Easterly Government Properties Announces Quarterly Dividend
data.description: In Washington, Easterly Government Properties, Inc. (NYSE: DEA), a real estate investment trust specializing in Class A commercial properties leased to the U.S. Government, declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.45 per common share. This dividend is scheduled to be paid on May 21, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 7, 2026. The company's Board of Directors approved this announcement. Easterly Government Properties, Inc. focuses on the acquisition, development, and management of properties used by the U.S. Government and affiliated partners.

data.title: Poll: Texans Report Declining Confidence in Jobs, Housing, Childcare and Economic Outlook
data.description: A recent survey conducted in Texas revealed concerning trends among residents. According to the Texas Lyceum 2026 Poll released today, findings showed that many Texans feel their quality of life in the state is declining. The survey also highlighted worries about the economic prospects for future generations, with optimism at a low. Furthermore, there is a growing skepticism among residents about democracy as the most effective form of government. The Texas Lyceum Poll is a respected source that provides insights into the sentiments of Texan residents.

data.title: Vertical Bridge Announces $1.5 billion Strategic Equity Investment from KKR
data.description: A communications infrastructure company based in Delray Beach, Florida, named Vertical Bridge REIT, LLC, has recently partnered with global investment firm KKR in New York. KKR has committed to providing a substantial $1.5 billion equity investment in Vertical Bridge. As the largest private owner and operator of communications infrastructure in the United States, this investment marks a significant milestone for Vertical Bridge. With KKR onboard as a new investor, Vertical Bridge now has a robust and fully funded long-term capital structure to propel its strategic growth plans.

data.title: Claros Mortgage Trust, Inc. Announces Dates for First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: In New York, Claros Mortgage Trust, Inc. (NYSE: CMTG) revealed plans to unveil its first-quarter 2026 financial results post the New York Stock Exchange closing on May 6, 2026. For discussions on the financial outcomes, a conference call has been scheduled for May 7, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. ET. Interested parties can join the call by dialing 1-833-461-5787 and mentioning the Claros Mortgage Trust, Inc. teleconference call.

data.title: Sow Good Posts Investor Presentation in Connection with Nachu Graphite Project Acquisition
data.description: Irving, Texas, April 22, 2026 - Sow Good Inc. (Nasdaq: SOWG) released an investor presentation regarding its acquisition of 100% of the shares of Ryzon Materials Ltd's Tanzanian subsidiaries, owners of the Nachu Graphite Project in Southern Tanzania. The transaction was disclosed through a Form 8-K filing with the SEC under Regulation FD Disclosure. The presentation, available on both the SEC's website and Sow Good's investor relations page, offers details about the deal and the project's location in the Ruangwa District, Lindi Region.

data.title: USVC by AngelList: Invest $500+ to access Anthropic, OpenAI, xAI. Non-accredited investors can now join major private firms.
data.description: AngelList has launched a new USVC fund, which now enables non-accredited retail investors to access major private corporations such as Anthropic and OpenAI. This initiative opens up the investment opportunity to a wider audience and allows individuals to participate in high-growth startups that were previously inaccessible. This move marks a significant development in the investment landscape, as non-accredited investors can now invest in these promising companies through the fund. AngelList's new USVC fund represents a shift towards democratizing investment access and has the potential to attract a substantial number of retail investors looking to diversify their portfolios.

data.title: iHeartMedia, Inc. to Report Quarterly Financial Results on May 11, 2026
data.description: iHeartMedia, Inc. disclosed that they will be releasing their financial results for the quarter ending March 31, 2026, on Monday, May 11, 2026. Following the earnings announcement, the company is scheduled to hold a conference call at 4:30 p.m. (ET) on the same day to review the financial results and discuss the business outlook. The call will be accessible via a live audio webcast on the Investors page of iHeartMedia’s website (https://investors.iheartmedia.com/).

data.title: WEX Inc. Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: In Portland, Maine, WEX (NYSE: WEX), a leading provider of intelligent payment solutions, announced their financial performance for the first quarter of 2026. Melissa Smith, the Chair, CEO, and President of WEX, expressed satisfaction with the results. The company surpassed expectations with revenue and adjusted net income both surpassing the upper limits of the projected ranges. This positive performance indicates a strong start to the year for WEX. The company remains committed to their strategy of enhancing their core operations while also seeking opportunities for growth.
